3.  The repeal of the provisions in the Acts and the Ordinance under
subsection 2(1) shall not affect any instrument executed prior to the
date of the coming into force of this Act.

act_title: *REVOCATION OF EXEMPTION FROM PAYMENT OF STAMP DUTIES ACT 1992
content:
1. This Act may be cited as the Revocation of Exemption from
Payment of Stamp Duties Act 1992.
Repeal of provisions in the Acts and the Ordinance specified in
the Schedule

act_title: *REVOCATION OF EXEMPTION FROM PAYMENT OF STAMP DUTIES ACT 1992
content:
2. (1)  The provisions in the Acts and the Ordinance specified in
the Schedule are repealed.
(2) The Minister may, by order to be published in the Gazette, add
to the Schedule.
6                                       Laws of Malaysia                         ACT 478
Saving
